description: Storybook throws 'preview hooks can only be called inside decorators and story functions' error. Root cause: ThemeProvider added to component library (co-vz3) but not registered as a global decorator in .storybook/preview.ts. Fix: wrap all stories with ThemeProvider via a global decorator in preview.ts so useTheme and dark mode work correctly in every story.
title: Storybook ThemeProvider missing as global decorator

description: Patrol mol-refinery-patrol has setup_command=empty and test_command='go test ./...' defaults, but components is a Node.js/TypeScript project. Running tests requires npm install first (setup_command) and npm test (test_command). Without these, tests fail silently or with 'command not found'. The rig config.json should set: setup_command=npm install, test_command=npm test.
title: components rig patrol missing setup_command and test_command config

description: Build DataTable Phase 1 using TanStack Table v8. Requirements: typed column definitions, client-side sorting (single and multi-column), client-side filtering (global search + per-column text/select/date range/number range filters), client-side pagination with page size selector, column visibility toggle, row selection (single and multi with bulk actions toolbar), row-level actions (inline button or context menu), clickable rows (onRowClick), loading state (skeleton rows), empty state, error state, export to CSV, refresh button slot, custom toolbar action slot. Built with Tailwind + shadcn Table primitive. Include Storybook stories and Vitest tests.
title: DataTable Phase 1

description: Add row virtualization to DataTable using TanStack Virtual. For large client-side datasets where pagination is not desired. Renders only visible rows in viewport, removes offscreen rows from DOM. Backlog item — implement when a project specifically requires it.
title: DataTable Phase 3 — virtualization

description: When running npm test from the components repo root, vitest discovers test files inside polecat git worktrees (e.g. polecats/slit/components/src/**/*.test.tsx). These worktrees have their own node_modules/react, causing 'Cannot read properties of null (reading useState)' errors due to React dual-instance collision. The vite.config.ts has no vitest 'include' pattern restricting test discovery to src/ only. Fix: add vitest config to restrict test files to src/ and exclude polecats/ directory.
title: vitest picks up test files from polecat worktrees causing React dual-instance failures

description: Currently on storybook 8.6.14. v9 (May 2025) and v10 (Oct 2025) are both out. Main blocker is storybook-dark-mode addon incompatibility — needs replacing with @storybook/addon-themes and preview.ts dark mode logic rewrite. Everything else is automated via npx storybook@latest upgrade. Recommend v9 first, then v10.
title: Upgrade Storybook from v8 to v9+

description: Build a Command Palette (⌘K / Ctrl+K) component wrapping shadcn's Command primitive (cmdk). Requirements: keyboard shortcut trigger (Cmd/Ctrl+K), modal overlay, fuzzy search across registered commands, keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter to execute), command groups/sections, icons alongside command labels, programmatic API for registering commands from anywhere in the app. Built with Tailwind + shadcn Command + Dialog primitives. Include Storybook stories and Vitest tests.
title: Command Palette

description: Extend File Upload with: retry failed uploads, duplicate file detection with clear error messaging, improved non-image file previews (PDF, doc, etc. with appropriate icons). Depends on File Upload Phase 1.
title: File Upload Phase 2

description: Add Vitest and @testing-library/react to the project. Configure vitest.config.ts (or extend vite.config.ts), add jsdom environment, add a smoke test for a basic component. Should run with 'npm run test'.
title: Vitest + Testing Library setup

Build File Upload Phase 1 using react-dropzone for drag/drop mechanics. Requirements: click to browse + drag/drop zone, file type restrictions (accept prop), file size limits with error messaging, single and multi-file modes, per-file progress bar, success/error state per file, image preview thumbnails, non-image files show icon + filename + size, remove/clear file before upload, callback-based upload (consumer provides upload function — we don't own transport), react-hook-form compatible, controlled and uncontrolled modes, mobile fallback (tap to browse). Built with Tailwind + shadcn Progress and Button primitives. Include Storybook stories and Vitest tests.
title: File Upload Phase 1

description: vitest.config.ts has no include/exclude patterns, so vitest globs all **/*.test.tsx including polecats/ subdirectories. Polecat worktrees have their own node_modules with separate React/react-dom copies, causing 'Cannot read properties of null (reading useState)' errors when those tests run. Pre-existing on main (not caused by any specific polecat branch). Fix: add exclude: ['polecats/**', 'witness/**', 'refinery/**', 'mayor/**'] to vitest config. Observed: 37 test failures from polecats/slit/components/src/components/ui/ (data-table.test.tsx x29, theme-provider.test.tsx x8). 123 tests pass in src/.
title: vitest picks up test files from polecat worktrees causing React duplicate hooks failures

description: Add shadcn ThemeProvider to the components library. Toggle dark class on root element. Ensure all existing components (Button, DataTable, Spinner) render correctly in both light and dark modes. This is a prerequisite for dark mode Storybook stories.
title: Wire up ThemeProvider for dark mode support
